label.name: sub
label.text: Pick a block grade to operate on

label.name: empty
label.text: No tracked blocks in your current claim.

label.name: hint0
label.text: Stand inside YOUR land claim. Costs drawn from owned crates.

label.name: a0
label.text: Repair -- fix damaged blocks of this grade

label.name: hint1
label.text: Only blocks of the selected type will be touched.

label.name: hint2
label.text: Materials drawn from YOUR locked crates inside this claim.

label.name: d1
label.text: Zombies don't notice you while inside your land claim.

label.name: d2
label.text: Walls of stealth: aggro, noise, and idle wander all filtered.

label.name: d3
label.text: Stand inside YOUR land claim to toggle. Suspends during blood moon.

label.name: needLcb
label.text: STAND IN YOUR LCB TO TOGGLE

label.name: hint
label.text: [No Perm] = need a perm. ON/OFF = toggle. Ready/Active/Cooldown = on-demand buffs.

label.name: hint0
label.text: Group details (priority, tag, perm count) whispered to chat as you navigate.

label.name: hdr1
label.text: PICK A PLUGIN — filters perms shown next

label.name: hint1p
label.text: '(All plugins)' shows every registered perm. Perm count per plugin whispered as you navigate.

label.name: hint1
label.text: Top 3 rows edit group identity. Below = perm grants. Description whispered as you navigate.

label.name: hint
label.text: Toggling Status pauses scheduled restarts. Reset last-wipe after performing an actual wipe.

label.name: hint
label.text: Vanish: invisible to players + ignored by AI.

label.name: hint
label.text: Whisper shows cooldown/permission status as you navigate.

label.name: sub
label.text: /m — navigate with scroll wheel, LMB select

label.name: hint
label.text: See chat — plugin names are whispered as you navigate.

label.name: hint
label.text: Cooldown / daily-limit details whispered to chat as you navigate.

label.name: hint2
label.text: Quest active? Press LMB twice within 5s to confirm.

label.name: hint2
label.text: Whispers show the result of each action.
